slides.name: Title Centered Chart
slides.description: A clean slide layout with a large centered title and a prominent chart (bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, or scatter) within a grey container. Ideal for showcasing distribution data, single-metric trends, or category breakdowns in a visually impactful way.

title.description: The main title of the slide

rows.description: Rows of data for the chart

value.description: Numerical value for the data segment

slides.name: Title Chart Metrics Sidebar
slides.description: A professional slide featuring a prominent chart (bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, or scatter) on the left displaying trend data, and a vertical stack of metric cards on the right. Ideal for presenting performance metrics, financial trends, or KPI comparisons with supporting data points.

title.description: The main title of the slide

chart.description: Configuration and data for the chart

columns.description: The labels for the data series, e.g., Revenue and Spend

rows.description: The data points for the graph

label.description: The X-axis label, e.g., Month names

value.description: The primary metric value for this label

value2.description: The secondary metric value for this label

metrics.description: List of metric cards shown on the right side

heading.description: Top label of the metric card

value.description: Main numerical value of the metric

slides.name: Title Description Bullet List
slides.description: A clean two-column layout with a main title and description on the left, and up to 5 bullet points on the right. Each bullet has a heading and a short description. Ideal for key takeaways, feature highlights, or structured lists with context.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The main paragraph description on the slide

default.heading: Market expansion
default.description: Prioritize high-growth verticals and geographic regions with strong demand.

default.heading: Customer retention
default.description: Reduce churn through proactive support and tailored success programs.

default.heading: Product innovation
default.description: Ship features that align with top customer requests and usage data.

default.heading: Operational efficiency
default.description: Automate repetitive workflows to free capacity for strategic work.

default.heading: Team enablement
default.description: Invest in training and tools so teams can execute at scale.

bullets.description: A list of up to 5 bullet points, each with a heading and description

heading.description: The heading for this bullet point

description.description: The description for this bullet point

footerWebsite.description: The website URL displayed in the footer

slides.name: Title Description Three Column Table
slides.description: A structured data presentation slide featuring a large header title on the left and a descriptive paragraph on the right, followed by a three-column table with a colored header row. Each table cell supports multi-line text. Ideal for presenting structured comparisons, problem-solution matrices, feature breakdowns, or any tabular data that benefits from visual organization.

title.description: The main title of the slide displayed at the top left

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The overview description paragraph displayed at the top right

table.description: The main table content with headings and cell data

columns.description: The headers for the table columns

rows.description: The data rows for the table with max 3 cells per row

slides.name: Title Description Large Image Right
slides.description: A balanced two-column layout with a title and descriptive text on the left, and a large prominent image on the right. The footer includes a website link and a decorative line. Ideal for introducing topics, highlighting concepts with strong visual support, or presenting narratives that benefit from an impactful image.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

default.__image_prompt__: A diverse team of professionals in business suits stacking their hands together in the center for a team huddle, symbolizing unity and partnership.

image.description: The primary image on the right side of the slide

slides.name: Title Description Eight Metrics Grid
slides.description: A data-centric slide with a centered title and description at the top, followed by a 4x2 grid of metric cards. Each card displays a label, a prominent value, and a supporting description. Ideal for presenting KPIs, dashboards, performance snapshots, or comparative statistics in a clean, scannable format.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: A brief summary or descriptive paragraph

metrics.description: A list of up to 8 cards showing key metrics

slides.name: Title Description Metrics Grid Large Image
slides.description: A versatile slide layout combining text, metrics, and imagery. Features a title and description on the left with a 2x2 grid of icon-enhanced metric cards, and a large vertical image on the right. Each metric card includes an icon, label, value, and supporting text. Perfect for executive summaries, project overviews, or reports where key data points need visual context.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M.
description.description: A brief description or context for the slide content

metrics.description: A list of up to 4 metric items

label.description: The category or label of the metric

subText.description: Additional detail or challenge related to the metric

default.__image_prompt__: Hands of business people stacked together in unity

mainImage.description: The primary visual image on the right

slides.name: Title Dual Comparison Blocks Numbered
slides.description: A comparison slide featuring a centered title and two side-by-side content blocks with circular numbered indicators. Each block has a heading and descriptive text with alternating highlight colors. Ideal for presenting problem/solution pairs, before/after scenarios, pros/cons lists, or any two-part comparison narrative.

title.description: The main title of the slide

default.heading: Problem
default.description: Presentation are communication tools that can be used as demontrations, lectures, reports, and more. it is mostly presented before an audience.

default.heading: Solution
default.description: Presentation are communication tools that can be used as demontrations, lectures, reports, and more. it is mostly presented before an audience.

index.description: The sequence number or index of the block

slides.name: Title Label Description Cascading Stats
slides.description: An executive summary slide featuring a bold title and descriptive paragraph on the left, paired with three cascading statistic cards on the right. The cards progressively decrease in width, creating a visually dynamic layout. Ideal for presenting key metrics, achievements, or highlights alongside context-setting narrative text.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

label.description: A short subtitle or category label

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The primary body text explaining the summary

default.heading: CUSTOMER SATISFACTION
default.content: Retention rate with an average rating of 4.8/5

content.description: The descriptive text for the statistic

slides.name: Title Subtitle Four Team Member Cards
slides.description: A professional team showcase slide featuring a centered title and descriptive subtitle at the top, followed by four horizontal team member cards. Each card displays the member's name, designation, profile image, and a brief summary. Ideal for introducing leadership teams, project members, advisory boards, or key personnel with their roles and focus areas.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

subtitle.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
subtitle.description: A descriptive sub-heading explaining the team's focus

image.__image_prompt__: Professional headshot of a female executive smiling
Professional headshot of a female executive smiling
Professional headshot of a female executive smiling
Professional headshot of a female executive smiling

designation.description: Job title or role of the team member

image.description: Profile picture of the team member

summary.description: Short summary or focus area of the team member

slides.name: Title Tagline Description Numbered Steps
slides.description: A clean two-column layout featuring a main title, tagline, and descriptive paragraph on the left, with a numbered step-by-step vertical list on the right. Each step has a circular number indicator, a heading, and a description. Ideal for outlining processes, workflows, methodologies, or sequential instructions.

title.description: The main title of the slide

tagline.description: A short tagline or label displayed with a bullet

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The main paragraph description on the left side of the slide

default.title: Order Placement
default.description: Customers choose products and confirm purchase online.

default.title: Payment Process
default.description: Payment is made through card, bank transfer, or e-wallet.

default.title: Order Verification
default.description: The system validates transaction details before processing.

default.title: Packaging Stage
default.description: Items are packed securely to prepare for shipping.

steps.description: A list of up to 4 numbered steps with titles and descriptions

description.description: The detailed description for this step

slides.name: Title 3x3 Metrics Comparison Grid
slides.description: A comprehensive metrics slide featuring a main title and a responsive grid of metric cards (1-9 items) arranged in up to three columns with row dividers. Cards can be highlighted for emphasis. Each card displays a label, a prominent value, and a detail description. Ideal for comparing multiple KPIs, benchmark data, or performance metrics across categories.

title.description: The main title of the slide

label.description: The small label at the top of the card

value.description: The large central value or metric

detail.description: A short description or challenge detail

isHighlighted.description: Whether the card should be highlighted

slides.name: Title Description Six Charts Grid
slides.description: Neo Swift layout with a title, description, and a responsive grid of up to 6 charts (bar, line, area, pie, donut, scatter, etc.). Ideal for dashboards and data overviews.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

values.description: Object with series names as keys and numbers as values

showGrid.description: Whether to show chart grid lines

slides.name: Title Description Six Charts Four Metrics
slides.description: Neo Swift layout with title, description, 4 KPI metric cards, and a responsive grid of up to 6 charts. Ideal for analytics overviews and performance dashboards.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

values.description: Object with series names as keys and numbers as values

showGrid.description: Whether to show chart grid lines

slides.name: Title Description Four Charts Six Bullets
slides.description: Neo Swift layout with title, description, a grid of up to 4 charts, and up to 6 bullet points in a sidebar. Ideal for data plus key takeaways, like neo-general Chart Grid + Bullets.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

default: Pipeline coverage above 3x target with strong enterprise adoption.
CAC payback under 6 months across segments.
Enterprise conversion improved quarter over quarter.

values.description: Object with series names as keys and numbers as values

showGrid.description: Whether to show chart grid lines
